title: Power conferred in Part supplemental
doc_html:
§579.  Power conferred in Part supplemental

The powers conferred by this Part are in addition and supplemental to the powers conferred by any other law.

Acts 1997, No. 1188, §1.

§579.  Power conferred in Part supplemental
